scripts.verify:platform: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm --filter @rex/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @rex/backend test && pnpm contracts:sync:report
scripts.verify:core-runtime: pnpm --filter @rex/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @rex/backend test && pnpm --filter @rex/engine test && pnpm --filter @rex/frontend test:integration
scripts.verify:knowledge-template: pnpm --filter @rex/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @rex/frontend test && pnpm contracts:sync:report
scripts.verify:governance-compliance: pnpm --filter @rex/frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter @rex/frontend test && pnpm contracts:sync:report
scripts.verify:work-packages: pnpm verify:platform && pnpm verify:core-runtime && pnpm verify:knowledge-template && pnpm verify:governance-compliance
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rex/frontend test && pnpm --filter @rex/backend test && pnpm --filter @rex/engine test
scripts.verify:e2e: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm perf:bundle && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e
